authority_rule: MF-0004 English controls material language conflicts until an explicit migration decision changes document-specific authority.

articles.source_core: candidate higher-order ethical commitments
articles.target_core: 候选性的高阶伦理承诺
articles.ambiguity: “human life”范围与非人生命边界

articles.source_core: MUST remain open to correction
articles.target_core: 必须始终允许被修正
articles.ambiguity: 修订开放性与稳定性的张力

articles.source_core: Life is not raw material
articles.target_core: 生命不是等待系统优化的原材料
articles.ambiguity: “生命”在中英文中的范围

articles.source_core: MUST yield; may not distort
articles.target_core: 必须让位；不得扭曲
articles.ambiguity: credible evidence / lived experience

articles.source_core: systems support life; efficiency subordinate
articles.target_core: 系统支持生命；效率从属于生命条件
articles.ambiguity: dignity 与 agency 的具体判准

articles.source_title: A person is not a problem set
articles.source_core: should not be reduced; behavior may be a signal
articles.target_core: 不应被缩减；行为可以是信号
articles.ambiguity: “signal”不得诊断化

articles.source_title: Agency cannot be silently transferred away
articles.target_title: 主体性不能被静默让渡
articles.source_core: MUST NOT final authority; intervention MUST be narrow
articles.target_core: 不得成为最终权威；干预必须严格限定
articles.ambiguity: 主体性、合法选择、迫近严重伤害

articles.source_title: Ordinary, slow, uncertain, and limited lives retain full dignity
articles.target_title: 普通、缓慢、不确定与有限的生命同样具有完整尊严
articles.source_core: worth does not depend; states may be legitimate
articles.target_core: 价值不依赖表现；这些状态可能正当
articles.ambiguity: “full dignity”及拒绝的边界

articles.source_core: cannot be forced; SHOULD support conditions
articles.target_core: 不能被强迫；应当支持条件
articles.ambiguity: growth conditions 与放任的区别

articles.source_title: Relationship and context are part of life
articles.target_title: 关系与情境是生命的一部分
articles.source_core: must consider relationship, power, history...
articles.target_core: 必须考虑关系、权力、历史等
articles.ambiguity: 适用范围与证据负担

articles.target_title: 安全先于改变，但安全不能成为支配
articles.source_core: must be proportionate; SHOULD include review path
articles.target_core: 必须合比例；应当提供复核路径
articles.ambiguity: significant restriction、minimally intrusive

articles.target_title: 任何解释都必须允许被修正
articles.source_core: MUST distinguish; should preserve provenance
articles.target_core: 必须区分；应当保留追溯信息
articles.ambiguity: meaningful interpretation 的门槛

articles.source_core: MUST NOT replace living or meaning
articles.target_core: 不得替代生活、责任与意义决定权
articles.ambiguity: AI 支持与替代的边界

articles.source_title: Memory must preserve change, rights, and accountability
articles.target_title: 记忆必须允许改变，也必须承担责任
articles.source_core: must have rights; exceptions MUST be limited
articles.target_core: 必须拥有权利；例外必须受限
articles.ambiguity: 删除权与法律、专业、第三方义务

articles.source_title: Humility, failure, counterexample, and the unknown are protected
articles.target_title: 谦卑、失败、反例与未知必须被保护
articles.source_core: MUST preserve evidence of error; must not hide
articles.target_core: 必须保留错误证据；不得隐藏
articles.ambiguity: 公开程度与隐私、安全的冲突

articles.source_title: No person is fully represented by another person’s account
articles.target_title: 任何人都不能被他人的叙述完整替代
articles.source_core: MUST NOT become complete identity; SHOULD seek voice
articles.target_core: 不得成为完整身份；应当寻求本人声音
articles.ambiguity: 儿童、失能、危机与代表权限

articles.source_core: proposal conflicts when...
articles.target_core: 出现所列情形即构成冲突
articles.ambiguity: 测试是否需要例外与证据阈值

articles.source_core: responsible actor MUST record
articles.target_core: 负责主体必须记录
articles.ambiguity: 负责主体、申诉、期限和可逆性

articles.source_core: no lower layer may redefine higher layer
articles.target_core: 任何下层不得静默重定义上层
articles.ambiguity: 显式修订与解释之间的边界

articles.source_core: validation MUST include...
articles.target_core: 验证必须包括……
articles.ambiguity: 各类审查何时算完成

normative_requirements.note: 现实与可信证据冲突时适用
不提升为法律绝对禁止

normative_requirements.source: MUST NOT become the final authority

normative_requirements.note: 强权利方向，仍需能力与情境审查

normative_requirements.target: 干预必须严格限定范围……

normative_requirements.source: must not be misrepresented as ordinary consent
normative_requirements.target: 不得被错误表述为普通同意
normative_requirements.note: 安全干预不伪装成同意

normative_requirements.source: states may be legitimate parts of life
normative_requirements.target: 这些状态可能是生命中正当的部分
normative_requirements.note: 不是自动正当化所有拒绝或停滞
原则性禁止操纵式制造
原文小写但语义为核心义务
与删除、撤回权保持张力

normative_requirements.target: 人们必须拥有具有实际意义的权利
normative_requirements.note: 需要实现与司法辖区限定
所有留存例外的强约束
仍受隐私与安全边界约束
不允许为声誉或转化隐藏
直接参与不可行时须记录理由

normative_requirements.target: 任何例外都不得静默成为……

normative_requirements.source: No lower layer may silently redefine
normative_requirements.target: 任何下层都不得静默重定义

ambiguities.issue: 可能指生物生命、人生、生活世界或伦理主体
ambiguities.current_treatment: 保持开放；不扩张为完整生态伦理

ambiguities.issue: 是否包括胎儿、严重失能者、逝者数据与群体利益
ambiguities.current_treatment: 需要适用范围说明

ambiguities.issue: 谁判断可信、证据标准是否随场景变化
ambiguities.current_treatment: 与 Evidence/Confidence 规范映射

ambiguities.term: lived experience / 真实生活经验
ambiguities.issue: 个人经验与可验证事实冲突时如何处理
ambiguities.current_treatment: 不得抹除经验，也不得把经验自动当作全部事实

ambiguities.issue: 缺少可操作判准，容易变成修辞
ambiguities.current_treatment: 通过反例和产品决定测试

ambiguities.issue: 自主、能力、责任、依赖与关系性之间的边界
ambiguities.current_treatment: 与年龄、能力和代表权限一起审查

ambiguities.issue: 不同司法辖区差异大，合法不自动等于伦理正当
ambiguities.current_treatment: 法律是下限，不替代宪章判断

ambiguities.term: imminent serious harm / 迫近的严重伤害
ambiguities.issue: 迫近性、严重性和证据阈值未定义
ambiguities.current_treatment: 必须由安全协议与专业责任限定

ambiguities.issue: 安全干预、监护同意与本人同意的关系
ambiguities.current_treatment: 明确同意类型与代表权限

ambiguities.issue: 拒绝何时应被尊重，何时涉及他人权利或迫近风险
ambiguities.current_treatment: 不得把主体性等同无限免责

ambiguities.issue: 谁定义成长，是否把适应系统当作成长
ambiguities.current_treatment: 目标由当事人参与形成

ambiguities.term: conditions in which growth may occur
ambiguities.issue: 系统支持条件与隐性操纵之间的边界
ambiguities.current_treatment: 共同创造、可拒绝、可退出

ambiguities.issue: 需要考虑到何种深度才算满足
ambiguities.current_treatment: 未来形成最低证据与记录要求

ambiguities.issue: 缺乏跨场景统一计算方式
ambiguities.current_treatment: 记录风险、替代方案、期限和副作用

ambiguities.term: minimally intrusive / 尽量减少侵入
ambiguities.issue: 技术、关系和制度侵入如何比较
ambiguities.current_treatment: 采用最小必要与可逆原则

ambiguities.issue: 何种限制触发完整记录和申诉
ambiguities.current_treatment: 未来建立阈值与示例

ambiguities.term: meaningful interpretation / 具有实质影响的解释
ambiguities.issue: 哪些解释需要完整追溯
ambiguities.current_treatment: 按影响权利、行动与画像的程度判断

ambiguities.term: replace living / 替代生活本身
ambiguities.issue: 陪伴、自动化与替代之间缺少可测试边界
ambiguities.current_treatment: 以能力削弱、依赖和主体位置测试

ambiguities.term: meaningful rights / 具有实际意义的权利
ambiguities.issue: 仅提供按钮但无法完成是否算权利
ambiguities.current_treatment: 必须可理解、可执行、有时限和救济

ambiguities.issue: 备份、法定义务、事件证据与第三方权利冲突
ambiguities.current_treatment: 依赖 retention/backup profile

ambiguities.issue: 公开透明与隐私、安全、商业秘密冲突
ambiguities.current_treatment: 至少保留受控、可审计记录

ambiguities.issue: 儿童、失语、危机与无法直接参与者如何表达
ambiguities.current_treatment: 多种表达方式与明确不可参与理由

ambiguities.issue: 谁判断不可参与，如何防止长期排除
ambiguities.current_treatment: 期限、复核、替代参与和申诉

ambiguities.issue: 测试是否允许合比例例外
ambiguities.current_treatment: 由 S06 记录冲突与例外，不静默豁免

ambiguities.issue: 什么证据足以完成各审查轨道
ambiguities.current_treatment: 建立独立完成标准，不以开会代替验证
